notes: Game Runs successfully, however experiences severe performance degradation during playthroughs longer than 30 min.  It is not due to CPU/GPU Throttling (stable 40/50 during playthrough), and doesn't appear to be memory.
title: Epic Battle Fantasy 5

notes: Starts to lag a lot after about an hour or so of playing, but is easily fixed by just quitting and starting the game again.
title: Epic Battle Fantasy 5
